notes: Secret values redacted: env var names recorded only. openclaw-gateway.service (system) and xtr-dashboard.service embed inline credential values in Environment= lines (names: NOTION_API_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN, UNDERSTAND_ACCESS_TOKEN).
